name: Peanut Butter Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling shortbreads.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, peanut butter, shortening, milk, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg. Beat just until blended.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Add to creamed mixture in low speed. Mix just until blended.
4. Press half of dough into 8-inch (20 cm) round baking pan or shortbread pan.
5. Bake one pan at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes, or until set and just beginning to brown. Do not over bake. Cool 5 minutes in baking pan. Turn onto foil on countertop to cool completely.
6. For icing, combine icing sugar, water, and peanut butter. Stir until well blended and creamy. Spread shortbread with icing. Place white chocolate in small resealable plastic bag. Microwave for 30 seconds at HIGH power. Knead bag. Repeat if necessary. Cut corner off bag. Drizzle chocolate over iced shortbread.
Makes: 2 Shortbreads
